title: MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING - 211info
text: LIFESTANCE HEALTH PORTLAND HALSEY STREET MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health evaluations; individual, couples, and faith-based counseling; and psychiatric medication evaluation and management services. 4224 NE Halsey Street Suite 335 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (503) 922-6616 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 922-6616 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts Medicaid, Medicare, and most private insurances. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Conjoint Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Psychiatric Medication Services Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - CHILD, ADOLESCENT, AND FAMILY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
